positive: Stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial map overlaid onto a geometric mountain range silhouette. The scene features deep indigo and cosmic teal backgrounds, with neon gold lines forming constellations and stylized mountain peaks. The primary focus is a central arrangement of glowing, stylized crescent moons and abstract nebula swirls. The composition must be highly symmetrical, high contrast, and utilize negative space effectively. Vector art style, clean line work, woodblock print aesthetic, maximalist symmetry, cosmic fantasy, perfect for screen printing on apparel, vibrant, glowing accents, solid color blocking.
